item.title: The 520th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps - Pride Month 2025 ep 10
item.description:
I really hope this is true
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild *every other* Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you either when I post or when I go Viral. If you wish to chat, I'm frequently in ElbowDeepInAHorse and PotatoCheesMonk's Discord Servers between the hours of 7pm and 1am GMT-5 during the week, and at unpredictable but frequent times Saturdays and Sundays. These are both VERY safe places for LGBTQIA+ people, if you need a community, please stop in! AbbiiStabbii's server is also amazing, *especially* safe for Trans folk.
OPE! Some of these were in a recent dump, too
@GreaseMonkeyOfLove
I know, Target is shite
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #LGBTQIA #PrideMonth #Pride_Month #Pride #LGBTPride #Phone_Dump #Meme_Dump #Memes #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple #GregFromHR #SteveFromAccounting #DougFromSales
item.dc:creator: PyroDragon

item.title: Memes and things vol 156
item.description:
Animaniacs!
God this is so true. My cousin bought a bird feeder and she called me come over just to watch the birds eat. It was great.
It’s called fashion, sweetie.
My notes from curse of Strahd recently - “bird amulet” “vampire daddy w/ hot man wife” “bad tree” lol I’m playing a reborn death cleric.
My goal in life is to be a wealthy ghost with full throttle knockers.
Being whimsical and weird fuels me.
I love this comic so much
I’d dip a grilled chee in there.
Literally my childhood dream. Now I consume pickles as I please and no one can stop me.
Nubbin is a snack master general.
P O O F
Or cabbage. Yuck.
I’m constantly making noise.
Nubbin tax! He was giving me slow blinkies while I took his picture!
item.dc:creator: razalude

item.title: Secretary of Defense, Pete Hegseth, should be fired and jailed for lying to Congress and dereliction of duty
item.description:
Part one where Pass the Bottle Pete shows just how embarrassingly unqualified he is for the position of Secretary of State.
This is shameful. Possibly the only person more unqualified for their military position is Donald "bone Spurs" Trump. They should both be stripped of their positions and tried in a military tribunal for dereliction of duty.
item.dc:creator: RichardPenne

item.title: Indonesian modern Dangdut
item.description: This kind of music is normally played in social gatherings such as wedding in rural Indonesian areas. This girl elevate it with her talent and skill to a new level. Her insta: https://www.instagram.com/arindiputry_?igsh=MTVtOW8xcm1rbmhvMg== Wow! My first 'Most Viral'! If you like this, please visit the girl's insta and support her. The purpose of this particular Dangdut music from Indonesia is to have it's listener have fun. Are you having fun?
item.dc:creator: SolidAqua

item.title: British Construction Workers Discovering a 2nd Century Roman Mosaic
item.description: This happened in 2022, I just hadn't seen this photo before and the juxtaposition of Europe's tallest skyscraper with a 2000 year old dining room was compelling.
item.dc:creator: Jonson71

item.title: Do Not Bite
item.description: NOTHIN' TO DO, I SUPPOSE!~ In all seriousness, this is an extremely important time in history. For anyone in the US - we are actively being taken over by a corrupt regime with aspirations of solidifying dictatorship. And they're very close! The bill that recently passed the house contains a sneaky little addition that could effectively end the power of the judiciary. In the meantime, ICE has been abducting our friends, neighbors, and families with impunity, and the administration has been deporting people to forever-prisons without due process. Trump has given the go-ahead to deploy military forces on our country's own citizens for peacefully standing against these injustices, and has been intimidating judges, governors, and members of congress for fighting back. None of this is acceptable. If this regime thinks it can undermine our democracy without any resistance, it is OUR responsibility to show them otherwise. --- Anyway, long story short: Trump is holding some kind of stupid birthday party for himself tomorrow using millions of taxpayer dollars, and it is our duty not to show up. In fact, we should all not show up SO HARD that he gets mad about it and throws his little party hat on the ground. If you attend the protests on the 14th (tomorrow!), please be safe. Bring water to stay hydrated, or an umbrella if it's raining. And for the love of god do NOT participate in acts of violence. That is what they want. The regime has been salivating at any opportunity to frame protestors as crazy, violent insurrectionists - don't give them any fuel for that narrative. I know we all have things we'd prefer to be doing with our Saturday, but these assholes don't take breaks, unfortunately! Haha, woo! Find your local protest here: https://www.nokings.org/#map
item.dc:creator: KatRaccoon

item.title: I wonder how veterans feel about this?
item.description: Source: https://bsky.app/profile/newseye.bsky.social/post/3lrjgrrtn6c2e Not Rant I briefly lived in a part of the world that had very little separation between police and armed forces, and that is one of the reasons why I don’t live there anymore. There is very little I can say here without divulging personal information. A rubicon has been crossed, there is no going back from this point. I feel terrible for the people of Los Angeles, they deserve better than this. This is a shameful day for the country, even by its own low standards.
item.dc:creator: DownvotesStarWars

item.title: Let's send food to Imgurians in need
item.description:
MrPuckett here excited for TheFreePizzaDude!!! If you'd like to help a struggling Imgurian get groceries or a meal today there are 2 easy ways -
You can find a request for food in the comments, reply to them and then send a DM to get an order set up Or you can contribute to the Imgurian Meal Fund and we'll send the food for you!
This has been such a huge help for us to feed more people and we can't thank you enough https://www.paypal.me/TheFreePizzaDude https://ko-fi.com/thefreepizzadude
And here's how you'd send it yourself! Any questions as an Angel? Just shoot us a message! We'll be on this username until 8pm central
The Pucketts are here to show you how it works for requests -
It's much easier for us to help requests in the US but we'll do our best to pick up requests from any country. Putting your country in your comment helps us match you to an Angel in your area
Any questions as a requestor? Just leave a comment! We'll have helpers on the post for 6 hours
15,484 meals since we started 1,120 grocery orders sent 6 more hours to help as many people as we can Let's get it going! ... Today's Meal Tally 230 1st, 2nd and 3rd by Pizza Angel @TheCraicen 250 4th, 5th, 6th and 7th by @OP 315 8th and 9th by Pizza Angel @IMPICKLERICK 330 10th, 11th, 12th and 13th by @OP 350 14th by Pizza Angel @IMPICKLERICK 430 15th and 16th by Pizza Angel @IMPICKLERICK 450 17th and 18th by Pizza Angel @imlepid 525 19th, 20th, 21st and 22nd by @OP 600 Michael Jordan by Pizza Angel @RightfulSin 715 Kobe Bryant, 25th, 26th and 27th by @OP 730 28th by Pizza Angel @xanderanimal Missed earlier- 29th, 30th, 31st, 32nd, 33rd, 34th, 35th, 36th and 37th by Pizza Angel fairskyes ... Today's Grocery Tally 245 1st by Grocery Angel @TheCraicen ... Alright everyone that's it for @OP Today we sent out 37 meals Filled one huge grocery order That's 15,521 meals since we started 1,121 grocery orders sent Well done everyone, see you next week!
item.dc:creator: TheFreePizzaDude
